title: Grass Slabs
description: Adds Grass Slabs to your game!
body:
![GrassSlabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ca25130ea4c351e9c41454d8915fcfda9b0e92.png)
This mod adds **Grass Slabs** to your game!
Perfect blocks for designing!
Available variants:
- Normal
- Snowy
- Dirt
- Path
- Mycelium
- Coarse Dirt
- Podzol
- Rooted Dirt

**Download now!**
